description:
Use the fz-rh2.9 sweep as the seed: 88 success fixtures passed both target/debug/fz2 run and target/debug/fz2 interp against expected.txt. Promote them into fixture metadata in batches, adding fz2-run/fz2-interp and fz2-build only after each path is observed.

Do not promote allocation/path-golden fixtures blindly; route those through the golden-decision ticket.

Signal: fixture_matrix covers the promoted fz2 paths, fixtures/index.md is regenerated/updated, and fz2_cli does not carry matrix-worthy one-off fixture coverage except for targeted telemetry checks.
title: Promote passing fz2 sweep fixtures into the matrix in batches
